svg.title: Overview of the NSF cardiovascular hemodynamics proposal
svg.desc: One-glance overview showing multimodal imaging inputs, the information field theory engine, four specific aims, validation path, and expected impact.

text.tspan: Fuse noisy PC-MRI, 4D Flow MRI, and Doppler Echo with physics-informed Bayesian inference
to recover geometry, flow, pressure, and uncertainty.
Bayesian inference over fields fuses measurements and known physics without
